lever: Reuse Jacobi Eigh row scratch buffers across iterations instead of allocating new row vectors inside every Jacobi rotation.

baseline.source: Pass74 final same-worker RCH rebench after axis0 Eigh move elision
baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass74-eigh-rebench rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_eigh/batched_matrix_3x3 --noplot --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_eigh/batched_matrix_3x3 --noplot --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

alien_inputs: arena/slab reuse: move fixed-size loop scratch allocation out of the hot Jacobi rotation loop
preserve the existing numerical algorithm and operation order while reducing allocator traffic

isomorphism_proof.ordering: The same p/q pivot scan, row update loops, eigenvector update loops, and output sorting order execute unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Eigenvalue sorting remains indices.sort_by with f64::total_cmp on computed eigenvalues.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Each row element and eigenvector element is computed by the same multiply/add/sub expressions in the same order; only Vec allocation lifetime changes.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state is read or written.
isomorphism_proof.fallback: Input validation, shape/rank errors, non-square errors, batch fallback, and nonleading batch movement are unchanged.

validation.result: 255 unit tests passed; 55 integration tests passed; dispatch_baseline bench harness smoke passed

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

validation.result: exit 0; 0 critical findings; fmt/clippy/build checks clean; existing file-wide warning inventory remains
